message:
MASSIVE REPO CLEANUP: 1.26 GB -> ~9 MB (99% reduction)

Deleted:
- texlive.broken/ (518 MB) — broken TeX Live installation
- download/ (447 MB) — screenshot artifacts
- upload/ (177 MB) — Discord voice messages
- 26 .deb files (111 MB) — font/TeX packages
- lualatex.fmt (5.5 MB) — binary format file
- skills/ (315 KB) — VM skill definitions
- _minted/ (9 KB) — minted cache
- node_modules/ (106 KB)
- 42 root-level test/aux files
- .env (secrets), bun.lock, worklog.md

Kept:
- src/ (themes, test-wrapfig)
- tests/ (stress tests)
- journals/ (all agent journals)
- notes/ (all research notes)
- scripts/ (compile.py, etc.)
- release/ (swarmwrap zip)
- BLACKBOARD.md, README.md, package.json

Updated .gitignore to prevent re-accumulation.
